title: On the Reef
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Trapped on the Great Barrier Reef, Andrew, Judy & Thudd battle blue-ringed octopuses, deadly sea wasps, and cone snails while outsmarting Soggy Bob's Octopus School! 🪸

q.en: When the Water Bug is trapped in the net, what animal do Andrew and Judy cut free from it?
q.zh: 水虫号被网困住时，安德鲁和朱迪从网里救出的是什么动物？

explain.en: They free a manatee — Thudd calls it a sea cow that eats grass; long-ago sailors thought manatees were mermaids. Its tail looked like a big gray Ping-Pong paddle.
explain.zh: 他们救出一头海牛——撒德叫它“海牛/海奶牛”，吃水草；古时水手以为海牛是美人鱼。它的尾巴像一只灰色大乒乓球拍。

q.en: Uncle Al yells for them to move away from a 'baseball' with glowing blue rings. What is it?
q.zh: 阿尔叔叔大喊让他们躲开一只带发光蓝环、像棒球似的小生物。那是什么？

options.en: A blue-ringed octopus — its poison can kill a person in minutes
options.zh: 蓝环章鱼——它的毒几分钟内就能毒死人

explain.en: Uncle Al says the blue-ringed octopus is deadly — as small as a Ping-Pong ball, it shows blue rings when mad, and its saliva poison can kill a person in minutes. It lives around the Great Barrier Reef.
explain.zh: 阿尔叔叔说蓝环章鱼致命——只有乒乓球大小，生气时才显出蓝环，唾液毒能在几分钟内毒死人，生活在大堡礁一带。

q.en: To stop Burpp's Egg-Mobile from hunting them in the reef, what do they use?
q.zh: 为了阻止伯普的蛋形战车在礁石里追他们，他们用了什么？

options.en: Mussel glue — they pile mussels on rocks so the Egg-Mobile sticks when it bumps them
options.zh: 贻贝的胶——他们把贻贝堆在石头上，蛋形战车撞上就被粘住

explain.en: Thudd finds mussels whose glue works underwater; they place mussels on a rock pile, and when the Egg-Mobile hits the rocks, the mussel glue sticks it (Burpp cries 'Mayday!').
explain.zh: 撒德找到贻贝，其胶能在水下起作用；他们把贻贝堆在石头上，蛋形战车撞上就被贻贝胶粘住（伯普大喊“Mayday!”）。

q.en: Judy's leg is caught between the shells of a giant clam. How do they make it open?
q.zh: 朱迪的腿被夹在大砗磲的两片壳之间。他们怎么让它张开？

options.en: They shine the flashlight on it — the clam opens when it gets lots of light
options.zh: 他们用手电筒照它——砗磲见到很多光就会张开

options.en: They tickle it with a feather

explain.en: Thudd says the giant clam has little eyes that see light and dark; it closes when it sees a shadow. Judy shines the flashlight on it and it opens, letting her pull her leg free.
explain.zh: 撒德说大砗磲有小眼睛能分辨明暗，看到影子就合上。朱迪用手电筒照它，它就张开了，朱迪得以抽出腿。

q.en: Soggy Bob fires something from the Crab-Mobile that sticks to the Water Bug's hood and tows it. What is it?
q.zh: 撒吉·鲍勃从蟹形战车里射出某样东西，粘住水虫号的车头并拖着它走。那是什么？

options.en: The No-Go Yo-Yo — a big black suction cup on a thick cord
options.zh: “不放你走悠悠球”（No-Go Yo-Yo）——粗绳上一只黑色大吸盘

explain.en: Soggy Bob says 'Hope ya like mah No-Go Yo-Yo!' — a big black suction cup on a thick black cord shoots out, sticks to the hood, and tows the Water Bug to the Crab-Mobile.
explain.zh: 撒吉·鲍勃说“希望你喜欢我的不放你走悠悠球！”——粗绳上一只黑色大吸盘射出，粘住车头把水虫号拖向蟹形战车。

q.en: In Soggy Bob's Sea Wasp Ranch, Andrew's foot is exposed to deadly sea wasps. How is it protected?
q.zh: 在撒吉·鲍勃的“海黄蜂养殖场”，安德鲁的脚露出、会碰到致命的海黄蜂。他们怎么保护他的皮肤？

options.en: Judy rubs clownfish mucus goo onto his foot — it keeps the sting away
options.zh: 朱迪把小丑鱼的黏液涂在他脚上——能挡住毒刺

options.en: They paint it with onion juice
They put a shell over it

explain.en: Judy remembers clownfish are covered with mucus that keeps anemone stings away; she rubs goo from a clownfish onto Andrew's foot, and the sea wasp tentacles only give a tickle.
explain.zh: 朱迪想起小丑鱼身上有能防海葵蜇刺的黏液；她把小丑鱼的黏液涂在安德鲁脚上，海黄蜂的触手只让他觉得有点痒。

q.en: The old compass Andrew found always points the same way. Why does its needle point north?
q.zh: 安德鲁找到的旧指南针总是指向同一个方向。指针为什么指北？

options.en: The needle is a little magnet, and the earth is a giant magnet that pulls it north
options.zh: 指针是小磁铁，而地球是个巨大的磁铁，把它往北拉

options.en: The needle follows the ocean current
A fairy inside the compass guides it
options.zh: 指南针里有个小仙女指引它

explain.en: Thudd explains the compass arrow is a little magnet; the earth is a giant magnet because of a big spinning iron lump in its middle, and the earth magnet pulls the little compass magnet toward north.
explain.zh: 撒德解释说指南针指针是小磁铁；地球因中心有巨大的旋转铁块而成为大磁铁，把小磁铁指针拉向北。

q.en: At Soggy Bob's Pearl Farm, octopuses put beads inside oysters. How does a pearl form?
q.zh: 在撒吉·鲍勃的珍珠养殖场，章鱼把珠子放进牡蛎里。珍珠是怎么形成的？

options.en: The oyster is annoyed by the bead and covers it with pearly stuff, the same stuff that lines its shell
options.zh: 牡蛎被珠子惹烦了，就用珍珠质把它包起来，那物质和贝壳内壁一样

options.en: The bead dissolves and turns into a stone

explain.en: Thudd says the bead annoys the oyster animal like a pebble in your shoe; the oyster covers the bead with pearly stuff — the same stuff it uses to line the inside of its shell — making a pearl.
explain.zh: 撒德说珠子像鞋里的石子一样惹烦牡蛎，牡蛎就用珍珠质把它包起来（和贝壳内壁的材质一样），形成珍珠。

q.en: Judy notices little orange clownfish swimming in anemones without being stung. How do they avoid the sting?
q.zh: 朱迪发现橙色小丑鱼在会蜇人的海葵里游却不被蜇。它们怎么避开毒刺？

options.en: They have a coat of mucus goo that keeps the anemone's sting away
options.zh: 它们有一层黏液，能挡住海葵的毒刺

options.en: They are too fast to be stung
options.zh: 它们游得太快不会被蜇

explain.en: Thudd says clownfish have a coat of mucus goo that keeps the anemone sting away, so they can live among the stinging anemones safely. (A real skin cream is even made from clownfish mucus!)
explain.zh: 撒德说小丑鱼有一层能防海葵蜇刺的黏液，因此能安全地住在蜇人的海葵中。（现实中甚至有用小丑鱼黏液做的护肤霜！）

q.en: When the Egg-Mobile is stuck, Burpp squawks 'Mayday! Mayday!' True Stuff says this is an emergency signal. Where does the word come from?
q.zh: 蛋形战车卡住时，伯普大叫“Mayday! Mayday!”。“真相小课堂”说这是求救信号。这个词来自哪里？

options.en: The French words m'aider, meaning 'help me'
options.zh: 法语 m'aider，意思是“救救我”

options.en: The name of a sea captain
The sound a stuck motor makes
options.zh: 卡住的马达发出的声音

explain.en: True Stuff says 'Mayday' is an emergency signal that comes from the French word m'aider, which means 'help me.'
explain.zh: “真相小课堂”说“Mayday”是求救信号，来自法语 m'aider，意思是“救救我”。
